fix.prompt: Correct grammar, spelling, punctuation, and capitalization while preserving meaning, tone, paragraph/line structure, bullet formatting, and all proper nouns/URLs/code blocks. Do not add explanations; return only the corrected text.

summarize.prompt: Summarize into concise bullets covering key facts, decisions, risks, dates, owners, and action items. Keep original language unless asked otherwise, avoid speculation, and return only the summary.

translate_ar.prompt: Translate accurately and naturally, preserving meaning, tone, line breaks, list numbering, and formatting. Keep names, brand terms, URLs, emails, numbers, and code unchanged unless context requires.
